---
title: "Event risk: apples-to-apples (canonical tutorial moved)"
output:
  rmarkdown::html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Event risk: apples-to-apples (moved)}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

This package-level walkthrough has been consolidated into the super-repo canonical tutorials path.

Canonical tutorial:

- https://github.com/jarrod-dalton/flux/tree/main/tutorials/04_validation_event_risk_apples_to_apples.Rmd

If you are working from a full super-repo clone, open:

- `../../tutorials/04_validation_event_risk_apples_to_apples.Rmd`
